## Plugin Submission

**Plugin name:** <!-- e.g. My Awesome Plugin -->
**Plugin slug:** <!-- e.g. my-awesome-plugin -->
**Type:** <!-- transcription / llm / action / post-processing -->

### Checklist

- [ ] `manifest.json` includes all required fields
- [ ] `principalClass` matches my `@objc(...)` annotation
- [ ] `slug` matches the directory name
- [ ] `README.md` with setup and usage instructions
- [ ] `LICENSE` file present
- [ ] `src/Package.swift` with TypeWhisperPluginSDK dependency
- [ ] Plugin compiles with `swift build`
- [ ] Version bumped (if updating an existing plugin)

<!-- Brief description of what your plugin does -->
